name: Arabia
summary: The land of pathless deserts where old Castro thought the center of the cult lay, and where Irem, the City of Pillars, dreams hidden and untouched.
description:
Of the cult, Castro said that he thought its center lay amid the pathless deserts of Arabia.

There, by his account, Irem, the City of Pillars, dreams hidden and untouched — the secret heart of a worship older than any land the record names.

sources.quote: Of the cult, he said that he thought the center lay amid the pathless deserts of Arabia, where Irem, the City of Pillars, dreams hidden and untouched.
sources.context: Chapter 2, The Tale of Inspector Legrasse
